problem_statement: Design a portable solar-powered water purifier for rural use.

Design an automated formwork kitting system.

The startup focuses on building an AI-powered automation platform that helps businesses eliminate repetitive manual work and increase operational efficiency. Many companies still rely on manual processes for tasks such as lead management, customer communication, document processing, and internal workflows. These processes are slow, error-prone, and costly.
